body.title: Weekly cloud escape rate report by category
body.result: cloud_escape_rate_report() tool + _cloud_escape_by_category() in metrics.py; 4 tests pass; deposits FACTUAL node weekly
body.description: Habit + tool: scan turn_log for last 7 days, bucket by intent category (greeting/status/code/design/factual/other), report cloud escape % per category and trend vs prior week. Primary progress metric for D316 progressive autonomy path. Deposit as FACTUAL node weekly so Igor can see his own trajectory.
